name: ASRock B760M STEEL LEGEND WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7200(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - eDP - Dragon 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: ASRock B760M STEEL LEGEND WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 support and Wi-Fi 6E.
